name: pcie-bracket
description: PCIe/PCI card I/O bracket (faceplate) geometry for low-profile (MD1/MD2) and full-height card classes — overall height, chassis-foot width, screw position, and card-length classes. See RESEARCH.md for per-value evidence and tiering.
sources: PCI-SIG "Low Profile PCI" Engineering Change Notice (ECN) to the PCI Local Bus Specification — named standard, not fetched (member-paywalled); backs low-profile bracket height (79.2mm), card height (64.41mm), and MD1/MD2 card-length classes [B] via secondary corroboration

PCI-SIG PCI Express Card Electromechanical (CEM) Spec — named standard, not fetched (member-paywalled, per existing libraries/connectors/RESEARCH.md precedent); backs full-height bracket height (120.65mm) [B] via secondary corroboration
https://www.brackets.nl/images/producten/pcb2.gif (PL-Tronic BV distributor guideline drawing, full-height bracket)
https://www.brackets.nl/images/producten/pcb3.gif (PL-Tronic BV distributor guideline drawing, low-profile bracket)
